File Processing.actual_meaning: CSV/PDF export format + PapaParse library for export. NOT complex file processing.

Database Required.actual_meaning: Browser-side IndexedDB for local document storage. Zero server database.

Complex Workflows.actual_meaning: 'automation' in negated context ('no automation'). 'pipelines' in OUT OF SCOPE section.

External APIs.actual_meaning: In OUT OF SCOPE section: 'Third-party connections (Stripe, Slack, etc.) — Not building.'

Multi-user System.actual_meaning: In OUT OF SCOPE section: 'Sign-in system or user accounts — Not building.'

reasons: All 5 complexity flags are false positives from keyword matching against negated/out-of-scope content
Zero authentication (UUID link sharing, guest mode)
DB + Auth combo NOT present (killer combo avoided)
3 P0 features (at limit but not exceeded)
Identical architecture to RetainBurn (Grade A, built) and CategorEase (Grade A, built)
override_justification: Classic overnight-compatible build. All complexity flags are false positives from negated/out-of-scope keyword matches. Zero backend, zero auth, zero external APIs. Same proven architecture as RetainBurn and CategorEase (both Grade A, successfully built).
